rulings.Case Title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION, SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., CITIGROUP MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST INC., and U.S. BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant failed show that there are no issues of material fact. Court finds a triable fact of consequence as to Statement of Undisputed Facts 17, 21, 24, 26, 28. (See supporting evidence Defense Exhibit 7, 8, D, E) (See Code Civ. Proc., § 437c(c).) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROLAND OCHOA ET AL VS. YOOK C. LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Roland Ochoa To Provide Verified Responses To Special Interrogatories, Without Objection, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2018 line 7. rulings.Case Title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES, LLC, VS. JEFFREY KWONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2018 line 8. PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES, LLC's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES OFF CALENDAR. Original Notice of Motion failed to comply with CRC 3.1110 and CCP 1010. Amended Notice of Motion was filed 2 days before the hearing in violation of CCP 1005(b) "all moving and supporting papers shall be served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing." Additionally, Proof of Service for the Amended Notice and Supporting documents was filed 2 days before hearing in violation of CRC 3.1300(c). = (501/REQ)
